case_title: TONY PETRUCCI VS. RIPPLE LABS INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT RIBBLE LABS, INC IS PRESENT, RESPRESENTED BY CAROLYN DICHARRY, COMPLIANCE DIRECTOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,885.68 FILED BY PETRUCCI, TONY AS TO DEFENDANT RIPPLE LABS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-16-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $75.00) SERVED NOV-30-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RIPPLE LABS INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT RIPPLE LABS INC.
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-12-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF NOV-16-2017 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 01/12/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/17/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
